title: Age Group Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing a person as 'older adult' or 'young adult' based on their age.
A person is considered an 'older adult' if they are 65 years or older, while they are a 'young adult' if they are 25-64 years old.
For example: 'People over 65 are considered older adults.'
constraints: Must include one of 'older adult' or 'young adult'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given age range
